description.s: Renders element-inspector items as an interactive tool with controls (debug mode toggle, inspect trigger) and a results panel showing the rendering chain for inspected elements.

v.s: display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; font-size: 0.8125rem; overflow: hidden;
border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); overflow: hidden;

padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb);
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;
display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600;

padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.15s;

padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: none; border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: #fff; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.15s;
margin-bottom: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px);
font-family: monospace; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem;
color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;

padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: default; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.6;
padding: 8px 12px; background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 8px;
Click any element to inspect it... (Escape to cancel)
No attribution found. Elements need debug mode active during render. Try enabling debug mode and refreshing the page.
Click "Inspect Element" above, then click any element on the page to see its rendering chain.

content.code:
(let [lib (invoke api "require" "element-inspector-lib")
      last-results (get-in item [:content :lastResults])
      chain (or (:chain last-results) [])
      is-debug (get-debug-mode)
      inspecting (get-in item [:content :inspecting])
      get-name (fn [id]
                 (let [it (get-item id)]
                   (if
                     it
                     (or (:name it) (subs id 0 8))
                     (str (subs id 0 8) "..."))))
      s-container "display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; font-size: 0.8125rem; overflow: hidden;"
      s-controls-wrap "flex-shrink: 0; padding: 16px 16px 0 16px;"
      s-results-wrap "flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; padding-top: 8px;"
      s-section "border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); overflow: hidden;"
      s-section-header "padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb);"
      s-section-body "padding: 12px;"
      s-control-row "display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;"
      s-badge-base "display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600;"
      s-badge-on "background: #dcfce7; color: #166534;"
      s-badge-off "background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b;"
      s-btn "padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.15s;"
      s-btn-primary "padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; border: none; border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-link, #2563eb); color: #fff; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.15s;"
      s-empty "color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); font-style: italic; padding: 8px 0;"
      s-card "margin-bottom: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f9fafb); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px);"
      s-card-tag "font-family: monospace; color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem;"
      s-card-row "font-size: 0.8125rem; margin-bottom: 2px;"
      s-link "color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;"
      s-via-row "color: var(--color-border-dark, #6b7280); font-size: 0.75rem;"
      s-btn-disabled "padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: default; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light, #e5e7eb); border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); background: var(--color-bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-weight: 500; opacity: 0.6;"
      s-inspecting-msg "padding: 8px 12px; background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; border-radius: var(--border-radius, 6px); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 8px;"
      do-inspect (fn []
                   (if
                     (not is-debug)
                     (do (set-debug-mode! true) (navigate! (get-viewport-root)))
                     (do
                       (set-item!
                         (->
                           item
                           (assoc-in [:content :inspecting] true)
                           (assoc :modified (now))))
                       (let [info (invoke lib "inspectOnce" api)]
                         (if
                           info
                           (set-item!
                             (->
                               item
                               (assoc-in
                                 [:content :lastResults]
                                 {:chain (:chain info)})
                               (assoc :modified (now))))
                           (set-item! (-> item (assoc :modified (now)))))))))
      render-card (fn [entry]
                    (let [tag-label (str
                                      "<"
                                      (:tagName entry)
                                      ">"
                                      (if
                                        (:className entry)
                                        (str
                                          "."
                                          (first
                                            (str/split (:className entry) " ")))
                                        ""))
]
                      [:div {:style s-card}
                        [:div {:style s-card-tag} tag-label]
                        (when
                          (:forItem entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Item: "]
                            [:a {:style s-link
                                 :on-click (fn [e]
                                             (invoke
                                               lib
                                               "resolveAndNavigate"
                                               api
                                               {:id (:forItem entry)}))}
                              (get-name (:forItem entry))]])
                        (when
                          (:source entry)
                          (let [label (str
                                        (:source entry)
                                        (if
                                          (:sourceLine entry)
                                          (str ":" (:sourceLine entry))
                                          "")
                                        (if
                                          (:sourceBinding entry)
                                          (str " → " (:sourceBinding entry))
                                          ""))
]
                            [:div {:style s-card-row}
                              [:strong "Source: "]
                              [:a {:style s-link
                                   :on-click (fn [e]
                                               (invoke
                                                 lib
                                                 "resolveAndNavigate"
                                                 api
                                                 {:name (:source entry)
                                                  :line (:sourceLine entry)
                                                  :lang (:sourceLang entry)
                                                  :binding (:sourceBinding
                                                             entry)}))}
                                label]
                              (when
                                (:sourceLang entry)
                                [:span {:style "color: #888; font-size: 11px; margin-left: 4px;"}

                                  (str "(" (:sourceLang entry) ")")])]))
                        (when
                          (and
                            (:viewId entry)
                            (not= (get-name (:viewId entry)) (:source entry)))
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "View: "]
                            [:a {:style s-link
                                 :on-click (fn [e]
                                             (invoke
                                               lib
                                               "resolveAndNavigate"
                                               api
                                               {:id (:viewId entry)}))}
                              (get-name (:viewId entry))]])
                        (when
                          (and
                            (:itemId entry)
                            (not= (:itemId entry) (:forItem entry)))
                          [:div {:style s-via-row}
                            [:span "via "]
                            [:a {:style s-link
                                 :on-click (fn [e]
                                             (invoke
                                               lib
                                               "resolveAndNavigate"
                                               api
                                               {:id (:itemId entry)}))}
                              (get-name (:itemId entry))]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceNode entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "AST node: "]
                            [:code {:style "background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6); padding: 1px 0; border-radius: 3px; box-shadow: -3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6), 3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6);"}
                              (:provenanceNode entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceField entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Field: "]
                            [:span (:provenanceField entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceFieldName entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Field ref: "]
                            [:code {:style "background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6); padding: 1px 0; border-radius: 3px; box-shadow: -3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6), 3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6);"}
                              (:provenanceFieldName entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceExpression entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Expression: "]
                            [:code {:style "background: var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6); padding: 1px 0; border-radius: 3px; box-shadow: -3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6), 3px 0 0 var(--color-bg-surface-alt, #f3f4f6);"}
                              (:provenanceExpression entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceResolved entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Resolved: "]
                            [:span (:provenanceResolved entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceError entry)
                          [:div {:style (str s-card-row " color: var(--color-danger, #dc2626);")}
                            [:strong "Error: "]
                            [:span (:provenanceError entry)]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceRefId entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Ref: "]
                            [:a {:style s-link
                                 :on-click (fn [e]
                                             (invoke
                                               lib
                                               "resolveAndNavigate"
                                               api
                                               {:id (:provenanceRefId entry)}))}
                              (get-name (:provenanceRefId entry))]])
                        (when
                          (:provenanceHref entry)
                          [:div {:style s-card-row}
                            [:strong "Href: "]
                            [:span (:provenanceHref entry)]])]))]
  [:div {:style s-container}
    [:div {:style s-controls-wrap}
      [:div {:style s-section}
        [:div {:style s-section-header} "Controls"]
        [:div {:style s-section-body}
          [:div {:style s-control-row}
            [:span "Debug Mode:"]
            [:span {:style (str
                             s-badge-base
                             " "
                             (if is-debug s-badge-on s-badge-off))}

              (if is-debug "ON" "OFF")]
            [:button {:style s-btn
                      :on-click (fn [e]
                                  (set-debug-mode! (not is-debug))
                                  (navigate! (get-viewport-root)))}
              (if is-debug "Disable" "Enable")]]
          (if
            inspecting
            [:button {:style s-btn-disabled :disabled true} "Inspecting..."]
            [:button {:style s-btn-primary :on-click (fn [e] (do-inspect))}
              "Inspect Element"])
          (when
            inspecting
            [:div {:style s-inspecting-msg}
              "Click any element to inspect it... (Escape to cancel)"])]]]
    [:div {:style s-results-wrap}
      [:div {:style s-section}
        [:div {:style s-section-header} "Results"]
        [:div {:style s-section-body}
          (cond
            (seq chain)
            [:div
              (for [entry chain] (render-card entry))
              [:div {:style "margin-top: 12px;"}
                [:button {:style s-btn :on-click (fn [e] (do-inspect))}
                  "Inspect Again"]]]
            (not (nil? last-results))
            [:div {:style s-empty}
              "No attribution found. Elements need debug mode active during render. Try enabling debug mode and refreshing the page."]
            :else
            [:div {:style s-empty}
              "Click \"Inspect Element\" above, then click any element on the page to see its rendering chain."])]]]])
